title: Illusionist
description: A small add-on for Trickster which re-adds the shadow blocks present in the 2.0.0-alpha.* versions.
body:
# Illusionist

An official add-on for [Trickster](https://modrinth.com/mod/trickster) which re-adds the Shadow Ploy and Revelation Ploy which are no longer present in Trickster 2.0.0-beta.1 and onward. These ploys exist to interact with shadow blocks, which are, quite simply, a method of disguising a block as any other. Shadow blocks were removed from the main Trickster mod due to issues regarding Sodium support; as such, this add-on currently breaks with Sodium.

![](https://i.enjarai.dev/u/iNOvDC.png)
